Get involved

Accessibility

Everyone should be able to take part.

We are committed to making Leicester Space Week welcoming, inclusive and accessible.

Event information

Each event will publish step-free access, accessible travel, captioning, sensory and dietary information before registration opens. Please share access requirements when you register so we can support your visit.

LEICESTER SPACE WEEKExploring innovation together

A citywide platform for space innovation, sustainability, skills and public engagement—built with Leicester’s research, industry and civic partners.
